name: Run Shell & Summarize
description: Execute a shell command and have the AI summarize the output as a notification

config.userPrompt:
Summarize the shell command output below in plain English.

Requirements:
- 2-4 sentences maximum.
- State what the command did and what the result means.
- Flag any errors, warnings, or anomalies.
- If the output is empty or the command succeeded silently, say so.

OUTPUT:
{{INPUT}}
